default.description: Default capability — main window + auth-popover popup

args.validator: ^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; command -v node$

^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; exec node -e \"\$\(printf %s '[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+' \| base64 -d\)\"$

^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; cd "[^"\n]+" && npm (ls @grpc/grpc-js @grpc/proto-loader --json|install --save --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund @grpc/grpc-js @grpc/proto-loader)$

^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; lark-cli docs \+fetch --doc "https://[a-z0-9.-]+\.(larksuite\.com|feishu\.cn)/[^"\n]*" --format pretty$

^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; lark-cli docs \+update --doc "https://[a-z0-9.-]+\.(larksuite\.com|feishu\.cn)/[^"\n]*" --mode overwrite --markdown - <<'PENGUIN_VAULT_[A-Z0-9]+_EOF'[\s\S]*PENGUIN_VAULT_[A-Z0-9]+_EOF$

^export NVM_DIR="\$HOME/\.nvm"; \[ -s "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh" \] && \. "\$NVM_DIR/nvm\.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && \(nvm use default >/dev/null 2>&1 \|\| nvm use node >/dev/null 2>&1\) \|\| true; export VOLTA_HOME="\$HOME/\.volta"; export PATH="\$VOLTA_HOME/bin:\$HOME/\.fnm:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"; command -v fnm >/dev/null 2>&1 && eval "\$\(fnm env 2>/dev/null\)"; exec node -e \"\$\(printf %s '[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+' \| base64 -d\)\"$
